title: SMACH Diagram Properties Pane Component
purpose: Displays a right-side panel for managing diagram states and transitions, including adding new states, adding transitions from selected states, and editing state properties.
module_context: Exports a React functional component PropertiesPane that accepts props for selected node ID and various callback functions for state management operations.

steps.content: Initialize local state for property editing with empty name and description fields.
Reset property form fields when the selected node ID changes.
Handle property field changes and update both local state and call the edit properties callback.
Render the properties pane UI with add state button, node information section, add transition button, and property editor fields.
Display appropriate content based on whether a node is selected or not.
Update the local properties state with the new value for the specified key.
IF a node is selected, call the edit properties callback with the updated properties.
